nasb.text: Then the king’s servants said to the king, “Behold, your servants are ready to do whatever my lord the king chooses.”

esv.text: And the king’s servants said to the king, “Behold, your servants are ready to do whatever my lord the king decides.”

cnv.text: 王的臣僕對王說：“我主我王決定的一切，僕人都必遵行。”

ccb.text: 臣仆对王说：“臣等谨遵我主我王的决定。”
